title: Mod Sound Volume Options
description: allow the volume of sounds added by mods to be changed for each mod
body:
# Mod Sound Volume Options   ## Description If you install this, you can change the volume of sounds added by mods.
Industrial mods can be especially noisy, so we created this to solve that problem. Required mods: [MCPitanLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcpitanlibarch), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
(When using on Fabric Loader, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is also required)
Mod Loader: Fabric Loader, Minecraft Forge Loader, NeoForge Loader
License: MIT License
Modpack: Useable
